title: Cattle Track AI common schema definitions

tag.description: Animal tag as spoken or typed by the user. Resolution is exact within OrganizationId. Duplicate exact tags are allowed and must return ambiguous.

idempotency_key.description: Stable client-generated key for retry-safe write commit.

unknown_enum.description: Escape enum value. The deterministic validator must stop write commit and ask for clarification unless a safe mapping exists.
